name: bun-thit-nuong
input: a plate of bún thịt nướng with grilled pork, spring rolls, and nước chấm on the side
notes: Alias `bun-cha` — Hanoi grilled-pork noodle bowl family. Both variants within ±15% energy/±20% macros per testing-strategy.md §2.9.1 reconciliation. Ground truth: USDA rice vermicelli + grilled pork shoulder + 1 spring roll add-in; nước chấm contributes ~30 kcal (trace fiber).
